title: dinebra polystachyos
intro: Dinebra polystachyos, also known as False Palafoxia or False Palafox, is a plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Dinebra polystachyos can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments in traditional medicine.
